boeken_intro: Book your stay at Villa Wildebras
prijzen_intro: Below you will find our indicative prices, and at the bottom of the page the availability calendar. Would you like to book or ask a question? Then fill in the form. We respond quickly.
hoogseizoen_actie: Special offer! 15 June to 15 July €100 per night!
prijzen_inclusief: All prices include cleaning costs, bed linen and tourist tax.
over_hero_alt: Dunes near Egmond aan den Hoef
over_intro_title: Take a look inside the Tiny House
over_intro_1: Villa Wildebras is a charming Tiny House located in beautiful Egmond aan den Hoef. The cottage is situated on the edge of the dunes on the grounds of an old flower bulb nursery. We offer a unique and comfortable stay, perfect for guests looking for peace and nature while still being close to all amenities.
over_intro_2: The Tiny House has been carefully furnished and offers everything you need for a relaxing stay. Enjoy the peace, the beautiful surroundings and the cosy atmosphere our cottage has to offer.
instagram_text: See more photos and stay up to date with the latest updates about Villa Wildebras on our Instagram page.
voorziening_1_text: Despite its compact size, our Tiny House offers all the comfort you need, with a cosy living area, fully equipped kitchen, comfortable sleeping loft and a modern bathroom.
voorziening_2_text: For extra atmosphere and warmth, the cottage is equipped with a wood stove, perfect for cosy evenings, even during the colder months.
voorziening_3_text: The kitchen is equipped with everything you need to cook for yourself, including a hob, fridge, coffee maker and all kitchen utensils (no oven or microwave).
voorziening_4_text: Enjoy modern comforts such as free WiFi, heating and a hot shower for a comfortable stay.
over_collage_2_alt: Interior photo collage of Villa Wildebras
ligging_intro: Villa Wildebras is ideally located in Egmond aan den Hoef, just a short distance from:
ligging_1: 5 minutes by car to the beach of Egmond aan Zee.
ligging_2: Direct access to beautiful walking and cycling routes through the dunes.
ligging_3: 15 minutes by car to the historic city of Alkmaar.
ligging_4: Close to various restaurants and shops in Egmond.
ligging_text: The location offers a perfect base for exploring the area. From the large windows of the cottage you can see the dunes, where wild horses and Scottish Highland cattle graze. All amenities are also within easy reach. Please let us know if you have any questions about our lovely Tiny House.
bijzonderheden_1: Our tiny house has been carefully designed and built with great attention to detail and sustainability. The unique layout makes optimal use of the available space, making the cottage feel surprisingly spacious.
bijzonderheden_2: The large windows provide lots of natural light and offer beautiful views of the surroundings. The warm colours and natural materials create a cosy and homely atmosphere.
bijzonderheden_3: Villa Wildebras is available for rent all year round; each season has its own charm in this beautiful area.
overons_timeline_title_8: Moved out of the workshop and stayed overnight for the first time
overons_section_1: We are Daniëlle and Albert, and in 2022 we started building our Tiny House. The cottage is located in beautiful Egmond, on the edge of the North Holland Dune Reserve – a place where the peace of nature and the view of Scottish Highland cattle and grazing horses immediately help you escape the hustle and bustle of city life. We ourselves live in Amsterdam, and now that the cottage is finished we love coming here to alternate busy city life with nature.
overons_section_2: We started building on a real tiny house trailer. From 3D drawings to the timber frame and finishing, every step was a valuable learning process. We sourced as many materials as possible second-hand via Marktplaats or even found them as discarded materials – and you will see: you would never guess that from the final result! Since summer 2024 the house has been in its place and we stayed in it for the first time.
overons_section_3: The small house is fully equipped because we use it ourselves regularly and know what is needed for a pleasant and comfortable stay. Whenever we are not staying there ourselves, we are happy to share it with you. We hope it will be a lovely place for you as well to relax and unwind.
booking_price_disclaimer: Including cleaning costs, bed linen and tourist tax. Final price always subject to confirmation.
